title: GCEX Group offers GB yield through GlobalBlock
message_html: GCEX Group offers GB yield through GlobalBlock ...
snippet: Leading regulated digital prime broker GCEX (GCEX Group) serving institutional and professional clients has launched GB Yield, a stablecoin-based yield solution designed exclusively for professional and institutional clients.

title: OpenPayd provides settlement infrastructure for LMAX Group
message_html: OpenPayd provides settlement infrastructure for LMAX Group ...
snippet: OpenPayd, a leading provider of financial infrastructure, has announced a partnership with LMAX Group (“LMAX”), the leading global cross-asset marketplace for FX and digital assets, to enhance settlement efficiency across its global operations.
